transitions.value: color 0.2s linear, background-color 0.2s linear, border 0.2s linear, box-shadow 0.2s linear
border 0.2s ease-in-out, background 0.2s ease-in-out, box-shadow 0.2s ease-in-out

families.value: "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, "PingFang SC", "Hiragino Sans GB", "Microsoft YaHei", 微软雅黑, Arial, sans-serif
